questions.prompt: After calling PolicyInsertForCopyPolicies to copy a baseline policy into a customer org, what's the easy-to-forget step that determines whether the policy actually takes effect?
choices: Setting the policy to Secured mode
Deploying policies in the target organisation
Restarting the agent on each endpoint
questions.explanation: The Copy Policies API documents this explicitly: be sure to deploy policies in the organisation where the policy was copied. Without the deploy step, the policy exists but doesn't enforce.
